title: Source straight-movement empty-arena observation canary

state_source.source_backing_scope: Trusted source kinematics expected frames are distilled into EnvState snapshots with empty occupancy; this is not a learned-observation oracle from the original browser source.
state_source.state_snapshot_policy: Use comparison.expected.frames positions/headings/alive for the listed ticks; leave occupancy empty because the source fixture forces printing off.
notes: The original source has no learned ray observation; this canary only checks how the v0 trainer helper encodes trusted source movement states.
The wall channel is allowed to encode absolute arena geometry, so perspective checks intentionally target non-wall channels and scalars.

remaining_before_promotion: Use source body/trail arrays, not empty occupancy, before claiming trail or collision observation fidelity.
Add borderless wrap, normal-wall terminal, and same-frame death observation canaries only after their trusted state snapshots are represented without helper-only shortcuts.
Keep browser pixel checks separate from this semantic ray canary.
